# go.mod.md

Template for the Pico/Go tier scaffold. Defines the Go module and minimum language version.

## Generated File: `go.mod`

```gomod
module {{PROJECT_NAME}}

go 1.22
```

## Placeholders

| Placeholder | Description |
|-------------|-------------|
| `{{PROJECT_NAME}}` | Go module path (e.g. `myassistant` or `github.com/user/myassistant`) |
